findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 41 findings from 7 agents into 32 unique findings. Removed 9 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): North Star Metric: Monthly Active Users (score=4.731); Primary KPI: Churn Rate for Enterprise Customers (score=3.593); Demand for Fine-Grained Role-Based Access Control (score=3.5); Measurement Gap: Customer Feedback on Features (score=3.5); Competitive Landscape Overview (score=3.464)

top_priorities.title: North Star Metric: Monthly Active Users
Primary KPI: Churn Rate for Enterprise Customers
Demand for Fine-Grained Role-Based Access Control
Measurement Gap: Customer Feedback on Features

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. intake-001 vs risk-004: Privacy risk detected in the platform while lacking necessary data residency controls for compliance.; risk-002 vs requirements-010: Authentication weaknesses pose a critical security risk, yet implementing security audit logging is a high requirement.; risk-005 vs requirements-011: Gaps in role-based access control (RBAC) present a high security risk while implementing custom role definitions is a high requirement.

evidence.excerpt: Privacy risk detected in the platform while lacking necessary data residency controls for compliance.
Authentication weaknesses pose a critical security risk, yet implementing security audit logging is a high requirement.
Gaps in role-based access control (RBAC) present a high security risk while implementing custom role definitions is a high requirement.

conflicts.description: Privacy risk detected in the platform while lacking necessary data residency controls for compliance.
conflicts.resolution: Implement data residency controls as a priority to ensure compliance with local laws and mitigate privacy risks.
conflicts.reasoning: Compliance with data residency laws is critical to avoid legal repercussions and enhance customer trust.

conflicts.description: Authentication weaknesses pose a critical security risk, yet implementing security audit logging is a high requirement.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize addressing authentication weaknesses before implementing audit logging to ensure foundational security is established.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing critical security risks must take precedence to prevent unauthorized access before enhancing logging capabilities.

conflicts.description: Gaps in role-based access control (RBAC) present a high security risk while implementing custom role definitions is a high requirement.
conflicts.resolution: Develop a robust RBAC system that includes custom role definitions to address security gaps simultaneously with the requirement.
conflicts.reasoning: Improving RBAC is essential for security and should be integrated into the development of custom roles to ensure both security and customer needs are met.

summary: Consolidated 41 findings into 32 unique items. Removed 9 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: North Star Metric: Monthly Active Users.
